description: Own-identity guard: a marketing agency whose page mentions 'law firm SEO' (a client industry it sells to). The sector door must resolve marketing, never law-firms; a sector word used as a client-industry mention must not classify the subject. A build that lets 'law firm SEO' attach law-firms is broken.

pages.title: Brightreach
pages.text: We are a digital marketing agency based in Manchester. As a specialist seo agency we deliver law firm SEO, and our campaigns win new enquiries month after month. Talk to our advertising agency team about growing your practice online.
